---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

<!-- What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today? Describe the use case, not the solution. -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What would the feature look like from a user's perspective? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you looked at existing settings, flags, or workflows that already do this? See ROADMAP.md for deferred features — some of these may already be planned. -->

## Scope + constraints

- Does this require any outbound network traffic?  (default answer should be no — this project is 127.0.0.1-only and zero-telemetry)
- Does this change the install surface? (new hook, new global slash command, new dashboard tab?)
- Would this belong in our code or in an upstream project (`JuliusBrussee/caveman` / `cytostack/openwolf`)?

## Willingness to contribute

<!-- Would you be willing to open a PR? No is a valid answer. -->
